message: We all know how frustrating it can be when the power goes out, especially if your phone or other tech decides to join in on the fun and die right when you need it most. I've found that being prepared for a blackout can really help ease those moments of panic. The Red Cross has some great tips on how to stay calm and collected during power outages, so you can make the best of a sticky situation. Have you ever experienced an unexpected blackout? What did you do?
